PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENG, JOHN CHENG, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, GUO JU $17,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF[S].
